---
page-layout: article
---

::::: hero-layout
::: hero-text
# Hi, I'm Rachel Gorman

I’m a graduate student in Applied Digital Sociology at Hunter College. My research focuses on the intersection of digital spaces and society, exploring how online far-right radicalization translates into offline violence using mixed methodologies.

My academic background is in criminology and sociological studies, with experience as a qualitative research assistant. I am passionate about contributing to impactful research through academic, non-profit, and industry opportunities in research, writing, and editorial work.

<a href="about4.qmd" class="hero-button">Read More</a>
:::

::: hero-image
![](fall.jpg)
:::
:::::
